Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-18 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals two exceptional performers at the top of the ranking. LINC ranks #1 with a composite score of 94.6, driven by exceptional consistency across timeframes—it's up 158% over a year while maintaining all four SMA gates (30/50/100/200 day), and outperforms SPY by 140.82% annually with a near-perfect bad_spy_score of 2.18. TNGX shows even more extreme returns at 846% annually, but with notably different characteristics: its ratio_1y_3m of 8.27 suggests acceleration in recent months, and its far lower bad_spy_score of 0.90 indicates it holds up better when the broader market declines. Both stocks pass 4 out of 5 ratio consistency checks and trade above all major moving averages, but LINC's score of 94.6 ranks it higher, likely because TNGX's massive 1-year return creates ratio extremes that slightly reduce the consistency scoring despite the strong absolute performance. The pullback_flag for LINC shows "buy_today," suggesting a short-term dip in an otherwise strong momentum setup.
